summary_ja: 5件すべてが既存パイプラインで処理済み。Dan ShipperのLenny's Podcast (entities/dan-shipper.md, 2026-05-25更新) と Ryan LopopoloのSymphony/Harness Engineeringインタビュー (entities/ryan-lopopolo.md, 2026-05-22更新) は既にwikiに反映済み。残り3件は同一post_idのSubstack追跡URLバリエーションの重複。take=0, reference=0, skip=5。

decisions.title: The AI paradox: More automation, more humans, more work — Dan Shipper on Lenny's Podcast
decisions.reason_ja: ★★☆☆☆ 既にwikiに取り込み済み。entities/dan-shipper.mdが2026-05-25に更新され、12の予測、Key Themes、引用符、Lenny's Podcast appearanceの全セクションが記載済み。log.mdにも「Added Lenny's Podcast appearance: 12 predictions section, Key Themes, new quotes」と記録。重複処理不要。
decisions.body_excerpt: Full transcript of 94-min Lenny's Podcast with Dan Shipper covering 12 AI predictions, After Automation paradox, SaaS economics, and the future of knowledge work inside Codex/Claude Code.

decisions.title: Extreme Harness Engineering for Token Billionaires: Ryan Lopopolo, OpenAI Frontier & Symphony
decisions.reason_ja: ★★☆☆☆ 既にwikiに取り込み済み。entities/ryan-lopopolo.mdが2026-05-22に更新され、1M LOC zero-human-code experiment, token billionaire (~1B tokens/day), Symphony orchestration details, ghost library spec format, dark factory patternが記載済み。log.mdにも詳細記録済み。
decisions.body_excerpt: Podcast transcript: Ryan Lopopolo on Harness Engineering, Symphony orchestration, 1M LOC codebase with zero human-written code, and OpenAI Frontier team's Codex usage patterns.
